zh.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Rhodri of Gwynedd是King Rhodri Ap Owain的兒子，於大約1150年出生在威爾士。他於1199年與Unknown在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Rhodri of Gwynedd是King Rhodri Ap Owain的儿子，于大约1150年出生在威尔士。他于1199年与Unknown在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Rhodri of Gwynedd was born about 1150, in Wales as the son of King Rhodri Ap Owain. He married Unknown in 1199, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.Dolwyddelan, Conwy, Wales: Dolwyddelan, Conwy, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Rhodri of Gwynedd est né environ 1150, à Galles, fils de King Rhodri Ap Owain. Il a épousé Unknown en 1199, à Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Rhodri of Gwynedd wurde um 1150 in Wales, als Sohn von King Rhodri Ap Owain geboren. Er hat 1199 in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom Unknown geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Rhodri of Gwynedd è nato il circa 1150 nel Galles come figlio di King Rhodri Ap Owain. Lui sposato Unknown nel 1199, nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Rhodri of Gwyneddは約1150年にウェールズでKing Rhodri Ap Owainの息子として生まれた。1199年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアでUnknownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Rhodri of Gwynedd(은)는 대략 1150년 웨일스에서 King Rhodri Ap Owain의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1199년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 Unknown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Rhodri of Gwynedd nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Gales filho de King Rhodri Ap Owain. Ele casou-se com Unknown em 1199, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Rhodri of Gwynedd родился около 1150 г. в местности Уэльс. Его отца звали King Rhodri Ap Owain. Он женился на женщине по имени Unknown в 1199 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Rhodri of Gwynedd nació aproximadamente 1150, en Gales como hijo de King Rhodri Ap Owain. Se casó con Unknown en 1199, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
